rows.finalText: The cards answer "What is the next right step in my calling" through Purpose / Calling with a right path emphasis. In Past, Bouquet (9) shows where things already stand: recognition and goodwill increase momentum. The sequence is cumulative, so the center changes how the ending lands. The hinge point appears in Present with Scythe (10), so a decisive cut reshapes the landscape quickly becomes both pressure and opportunity. Future movement in Future and Book (26) points to not everything is visible yet, provided the central pressure is handled honestly. The middle turn shapes how the outcome develops. Read it as movement, not a frozen verdict. This spread works best when read as motion rather than summary. Read Bouquet (9) with Scythe (10) as the thread holding the sequence together: a blend of gift and cut, asking you to offer gratitude and receive support while staying alert to reactive or harsh decisions. Commit to one practical move and review the result before deciding further.
